name: clench-code
description: clench-code — TypeScript implementation and parity test suite; behavior is validated against the repository reference sources (see workspace migration manifest)

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && esbuild src/porting-workspace-cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/porting-workspace-cli.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.copyFileSync('dist/porting-workspace-cli.js','dist/porting-workspace.js')"
